title: Auxiliary files for Compiling the surface code to crossbar spin qubit architectures
author: Pataki, Dávid
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the auxiliary files of the manuscript 'Compiling the surface code to crossbar spin qubit architectures'. 
 
  ZcyclePulseSequence.xlsx : Excel sheet containing the abstract gate voltage and ESR pulse sequence for the surface code Z-cycle. 
  XcyclePulseSequence.xlsx : Excel sheet containing the abstract gate voltage and ESR pulse sequence for the surface code X-cycle. 
  configurationsZ.txt : Text file containing the configurations (electron and plunger configurations) encountered during the Z-cycle shuttling protocol, as rows. This file is an input for the shuttling verification algorithm. 
  shiftsZ.txt : Text file containing the shifts (describing the movement of electrons) of the Z-cycle shuttling protocol, as rows. This file is an input for the shuttling verification algorithm. 
  configurationsX.txt : Text file containing the electron configurations encountered during the X-cycle shuttling protocol. This file is an input for the shuttling verification algorithm. 
  shiftsX.txt : Text file containing the shifts (describing the movement of electrons) of the X-cycle shuttling protocol, as rows. This file is an input for the shuttling verification algorithm. 
  ZcycleMovie.pdf : Document containing a visual representation of the abstract pulse sequence of the surface code Z-cycle (ZcyclePulseSequence.xlsx). 
  XcycleMovie.pdf : Document containing a visual representation of the abstract pulse sequence of the surface code X-cycle (XcyclePulseSequence.xlsx). 
 
 The code of the shuttling verification algorithm is available here:  https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.14047331

  ZcyclePulseSequence.xlsx : Excel sheet containing the abstract gate voltage and ESR pulse sequence for the surface code Z-cycle. 
  XcyclePulseSequence.xlsx : Excel sheet containing the abstract gate voltage and ESR pulse sequence for the surface code X-cycle. 
  configurationsZ.txt : Text file containing the configurations (electron and plunger configurations) encountered during the Z-cycle shuttling protocol, as rows. This file is an input for the shuttling verification algorithm. 
  shiftsZ.txt : Text file containing the shifts (describing the movement of electrons) of the Z-cycle shuttling protocol, as rows. This file is an input for the shuttling verification algorithm. 
  configurationsX.txt : Text file containing the electron configurations encountered during the X-cycle shuttling protocol. This file is an input for the shuttling verification algorithm. 
  shiftsX.txt : Text file containing the shifts (describing the movement of electrons) of the X-cycle shuttling protocol, as rows. This file is an input for the shuttling verification algorithm. 
  ZcycleMovie.pdf : Document containing a visual representation of the abstract pulse sequence of the surface code Z-cycle (ZcyclePulseSequence.xlsx). 
  XcycleMovie.pdf : Document containing a visual representation of the abstract pulse sequence of the surface code X-cycle (XcyclePulseSequence.xlsx). 
 
 The code of the shuttling verification algorithm is available here:  https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.14047331
